APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY DAVID LOWE, ESQ. & WILLIAM MCELHINNY, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; OLIVIA FLORIO ROBERTS, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCE BY ALAN LEVINS, ESQ. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT MADE A DISCLOSURE RE MR. LEVINS. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. ARGUED AND THE COURT DID NOT FIND GOOD CAUSE AND DENIED THE MOTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOTION MAY BE REFILED IF NECESSARY.
